opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: No booking button, no online booking tools detected, and phone-only contact confirmed.
opportunities.observation: Boise customers searching after hours cannot book, sending leads directly to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered 24/7 scheduling widget to capture and confirm plumbing appointments automatically.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; phone-only contact means all leads exist only in memory.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call from a Boise homeowner is permanently lost with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture with automatic CRM logging to record every inbound lead and inquiry.

opportunities.label: Post-Job Follow-Up
opportunities.signal: Only 68 reviews despite operating in Boise market with no automated review-request patterns evident.
opportunities.observation: Low review velocity suggests completed jobs generate no automated touchpoints, leaving reputation growth stalled.
opportunities.fix: Automate post-job SMS sequences requesting Google reviews and repeat service bookings from satisfied customers.
